events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Bottom line: bar size compliance cannot be confirmed from this photo — spacing and cover being consistent doesn't verify diameter/size, since that requires either legible mill markings/deformation pattern on the bars or a scale reference in frame to measure diameter, neither of which is present. Given the drawings specify different sizes for top and bottom mats, this needs on-site verification (close-up photos of markings, caliper/tape measurement, cross-check against placing drawings) before the pour proceeds — hence `needs_more_info` rather than a pass or fail.
